items.title: Extract auth token validation into middleware
items.description: Token validation is copy-pasted in 11 route handlers with drift between them. Two handlers skip expiry checks entirely.

items.name: Remove unused GraphQL resolvers
items.details: 14 resolvers with zero traffic in the last 6 months per Apollo metrics.

items.title: Rename ctx.db2 to ctx.analyticsDb
items.description: db2 is not IBM DB2 — it is the analytics replica. Confuses everyone.

items.title: Upgrade Express 4 to 5
items.description: Blocking async error handling cleanup across all routes.
items.blocked_reason: Waiting on express-session v5 compatibility release

items.title: Memoize permission tree computation
items.description: Recomputed on every request; profiling shows 18% of request time for org admins.

items.title: Add contract tests for billing webhooks

items.description: This one has no title and should be skipped by the importer

items.title: Collapse three date-formatting helpers into one
items.description: formatDate, dateToString and prettyDate disagree on timezones.
